title: Minecraft but... Silabear drops OP loot
description: This datapack makes Silabear drop op loot
body:
## Idea This lightweight, highly optimised, high effort pack makes [Silabear](https://modrinth.com/user/Silabear) drop OP loot
It really is that simple
Not much to explain
Just enjoy In case just the knowledge of the packs awesome simplicity doesn't impress you enough or you are just curious on what exactly is meant by "OP (Overpowered) Loot", here is a more complete and appropriate description of the datapack: In a world with this datapack enabled, [Silabear](https://modrinth.com/user/Silabear) can drop ~~many~~ a few items which can be described as "OP" or "Overpowered", which describes them being extremely good and usually hard to obtain (not saying that [Silabear](https://modrinth.com/user/Silabear) is bad at pvp but-), like for example ENCHANTED golden apples, diamonds, diamond BLOCKS or even some netherite armor pieces. If the luck isn't on your side they might also just drop a stone axe. (But hey, at least you don't need a silktouch pickaxe now!) ## Credit I must admit, and i am proud of that, that this was soley MY idea
So credit where credit is due:
Flyrr: Doing an awesome job coming up with and creating this awesome datapack
Of course, [Silabear](https://modrinth.com/user/Silabear) (yes, the man himself) also did a huge contribution to this datapack by being an awesome friend and being there through almost my entire minecraft datapacking journey! Thank you [Silabear](https://modrinth.com/user/Silabear) ### Need a minecraft server?
